identity.name: COMEP Digital
identity.mission: Monitoramento transparente e eficiente da rede municipal de ensino de Pereiro-CE.

typography.installation: Import fonts via Google Fonts in index.html: <link href='https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Inter:wght@400;500;600&family=Manrope:wght@500;600;700;800&display=swap' rel='stylesheet'>

usage_rules.card: bg-white border border-slate-200 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow

login_page.right_panel: Full height image (Students in classroom), overlay gradient (teal-900/40)

dashboard.structure: Sidebar (Left, Fixed) + Header (Top, Sticky) + Main Content (Scroll)

widgets.stats_card: Simple metric, icon on right, trend indicator
widgets.chart_card: White bg, title top-left, Shadcn Chart content
widgets.table_card: Full width, striped rows, pagination bottom-right

rules: Ensure 4.5:1 contrast ratio for normal text
All images must have alt text
Use semantic HTML (main, nav, aside, section)
Form inputs must have associated labels

instructions_to_main_agent: Use 'shadcn/ui' components for all interactive elements (forms, dialogs, dropdowns).
Do NOT use 'Inter' for headings; use 'Manrope'.
For the dashboard, use a 'High Density' grid layout (Mode B) as described in E1 rules.
Implement the specific color palette defined in 'colors' section. Do not rely on default Tailwind colors.
Ensure the 'Login Page' follows the split-screen design pattern.
For charts, use Recharts (via shadcn/ui charts if available) with the institutional palette.
All interactive elements MUST include data-testid attributes.
Mock API calls initially but structure services for easy backend integration.
universal_guidelines: Create depth through layered design elements.
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable.
Never use AI assistant Emoji characters for icons.
